history.qwen_observation: SpringFox packages (springfox.documentation.*) don't exist after UpgradeSpringBoot_2_7 recipe runs, causing compilation failure
history.qwen_rationale: SpringFox is abandoned and incompatible with Spring Boot 2.7+. The SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe must run before any Spring Boot upgrade to replace SpringFox dependencies and code with springdoc-openapi equivalents, preventing the 'package springfox does not exist' compilation error.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe failed at JDK 11 because it removed SpringFox dependencies but the build still attempted to compile SpringFox configuration classes, likely due to recipe incompatibility with JDK 11 or incomplete migration.
history.qwen_rationale: Moving the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration to JDK 17 (as recommended by the observation library) ensures the recipe runs in a compatible environment after the project has been upgraded to Spring Boot 2.7 and Java 17 build settings. This prevents premature dependency removal and allows the recipe to properly rewrite configuration classes before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade.

history.qwen_observation: SpringFox packages fail to resolve during Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade on JDK 11, and the SpringFoxToSpringDoc migration recipe also fails on JDK 11, indicating the recipe requires JDK 17 to execute properly.
history.qwen_rationale: The SpringFox-to-SpringDoc migration must happen on JDK 17 (where the recipe can run) and before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade (where SpringFox is incompatible). Since SpringFox breaks during the Spring Boot 2.7 upgrade on JDK 11, we skip that step entirely and go straight to upgrading the build to Java 17, then migrate SpringFox to SpringDoc on JDK 17, then upgrade to Spring Boot 3.3. This avoids the compilation failure caused by SpringFox incompatibility with newer Spring Boot versions while ensuring the migration recipe runs on a compatible JDK.

history.qwen_observation: The SpringFoxToSpringDoc recipe removed the SpringFox dependency but failed to rewrite the custom SpringFoxConfiguration.java file, causing compilation to fail with missing package errors.
history.qwen_rationale: Since the explicit SpringFox migration recipe proved fragile and left orphaned source code, I will remove it and rely on the UpgradeSpringBoot_3_3 meta-recipe, which internally composes SpringFox migration logic and is more robust for handling dependency and source code transitions together under JDK 17.

history.qwen_observation: POM resolution failed during Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade because assertj-bom:3.18.1 is missing from the Nexus and assertj-core lacks an explicit version.
history.qwen_rationale: Insert a step to explicitly version assertj-core to 3.25.3 and set the assertj.version property before the Spring Boot 3.3 upgrade, bypassing the missing BOM artifact and satisfying Maven's version requirement.
